name: Canyon Lake Boating
description: 8,230-acre reservoir with 20+ boat ramps. Popular for skiing, wakeboarding, fishing, and pontoon cruising.

name: Guadalupe River Whitewater
description: Some of the best whitewater in Texas below Canyon Dam. Kayaking, tubing, and swimming through limestone bluffs.

name: Whitewater Amphitheater
description: One of Texas' best outdoor live music venues, drawing national acts in a beautiful riverside setting.

name: Overlook Park
description: Public day-use park with panoramic views of Canyon Lake and a 1-mile hiking loop trail.

name: Heritage Museum of the Texas Hill Country
description: Local history museum showcasing Hill Country heritage, pioneer life, and the area's geological history.

name: Canyon Lake Fishing
description: Year-round fishing for largemouth bass, catfish, and white bass. Multiple marina access points.
